summaries.title: 9/10 Upgrade — repo cleanup, product README, reuse analytics, security hardening, dashboard polish
summaries.summary: This lesson details a 5-phase upgrade to improve a project from 7/10 to 9/10 quality, focusing on security hardening (e.g., `.gitignore` and `.mcp.json`), a product-focused README rewrite, and adding a reuse analytics endpoint. The key takeaway is that a cloud dashboard should be treated as the main product, achieved through branding elements like a hero section, gradient logo, and PWA/SEO metadata.
